posts.author: asanders (Aryeh Sanders)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m in the process of setting up Monday.com for my team and could really use some assistance. The setup should be relatively straightforward for someone experienced with the platform, but I want to make sure I’m implementing it in the best way possible.

Here’s a bit more about what I need:

  • Tracking multiple project workflows.
  • Automations to streamline recurring tasks.
  • A system that’s organized and easy to manage for the team.

I’m working within a tight budget, so if anyone in the community has experience and can offer their expertise at an affordable rate, I’d greatly appreciate it. Please feel free to comment DM me (if that’s possible on this platform) if you’re interested or know someone who can help!

Thanks in advance for your support!
Aryeh
